valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 08 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 09 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low just north of Faeroes 999 expected Norwegian Sea 1004 by midday tomorrow. Low just west of Trafalgar 998 slow-moving, filling 999 by same time

Wind
In northwest, southwesterly veering westerly, 4 to 6. In southeast, southerly 4 to 6, becoming cyclonic 3 to 5.

In northwest, showers. In southeast, rain then showers.

In northwest, good, occasionally moderate. In southeast, good, occasionally poor at first.
